mapper.select: select * from pitch_time where ( #{pitch_id} IS NULL or pitch_id = #{pitch_id} ) and (#{time_id} IS NULL or time_slot_id = #{time_id})

SELECT pt.price, pt.status, pt.pitch_id, pt.time_slot_id, t.start_time, t.end_time, p.name, p.address, pt1.name as name_pitch FROM pitch_time pt join time_slot t join pitch p join pitch_type pt1 where pitch_id = 1 and start_time >now() and status = 'ranh';
